app.title: BioOrchestrator
app.subtitle: Predict, compare, and plan — agronomic intelligence backed by trial data from similar environments.

hubs.planningDescription: Choose crops and varieties before sowing.
hubs.campaignDescription: Monitor stress, yield trajectory, and irrigation during the season.
hubs.codexDescription: Browse species parameters, trials, and reference data.
hubs.noCampaign: No crop assigned on this parcel

cropPlanner.title: Recommend crops
cropPlanner.subtitle: Analyze your parcel to find the best crops for winter and summer.

varietyFinder.title: Variety Finder
varietyFinder.subtitle: Best-adapted varieties for your parcel, climate and soil. Ranked by yield from similar trial sites.

parcelStatus.title: Current Parcel Status
parcelStatus.subtitle: Real-time crop stress, water balance, and active alerts from sensor and satellite data.

comparator.title: Crop Comparator
comparator.subtitle: Side-by-side crop comparison for your parcel: yield potential, margin, carbon score.

rotationPlanner.title: Rotation Planner
rotationPlanner.subtitle: Multi-year rotation design with CAP compliance scoring.

waterBudget.title: Water Budget
waterBudget.subtitle: Irrigation needs based on ETc, rainfall forecast, and soil available water.

regenerative.title: Regenerative Sequence
regenerative.subtitle: Cover crop + protein crop sequences with carbon and nitrogen projections.

catalog.title: Crop Catalog
catalog.subtitle: Browse species and varieties with complete agronomic profiles.

climate.title: Climate Map
climate.subtitle: Köppen-Geiger zone explorer with trial site data.

phenology.title: Phenology Browser
phenology.subtitle: Kc, D1, D2, MDS parameters by species, stage, and cultivar.

thermal.title: Thermal Tolerance
thermal.subtitle: Heat and frost damage thresholds per species.

npk.title: NPK Profiles
npk.subtitle: Nutrient absorption rates per phenological stage.

soil.title: Soil Requirements
soil.subtitle: pH, texture, drainage, and salinity per crop.

rotation.title: Rotation Constraints
rotation.subtitle: Minimum intervals between crops from FAO guidelines.

organic.title: Organic Inputs
organic.subtitle: Authorized organic products per crop from EPPO.

pipeline.title: Pipeline
pipeline.subtitle: Data ingestion orchestrator across biodiversity sources.

wofostSimulation.title: WOFOST Simulation
wofostSimulation.subtitle: Mechanistic daily LAI and biomass curve for the selected parcel.

simulateScenario.title: Simulate alternative
simulateScenario.subtitle: What if you had planted a different crop? Compare yield, fertilizer, and rotation with real parcel data.

yieldProjection.title: Yield Projection
yieldProjection.subtitle: Yield estimates from trial data and stress-corrected in-campaign projections.

speciesExplorer.title: Species Explorer
speciesExplorer.subtitle: Browse 45+ species with full phenology, thermal tolerance, soil requirements and NPK profiles.

app.selectParcelPrompt: Select a parcel above to get started

advanced.title: Advanced tools
advanced.subtitle: Scientific reference, data sources and technical tools

scenarioMode.pickCrop: Choose a crop for exploration mode
scenarioMode.bannerTitle: EXPLORATION MODE — not the real campaign
scenarioMode.bannerBody: Planning tools use the hypothetical crop below. Nothing is written to the parcel assignment.
scenarioMode.bannerCampaignHint: Campaign tools are disabled until you turn off exploration mode.
scenarioMode.campaignBlocked: Campaign tools unavailable in exploration mode
scenarioMode.campaignBlockedDetail: Turn off exploration mode in the parcel bar to view the real in-season campaign.
scenarioMode.campaignCardsBlocked: Campaign tools are paused while exploration mode is active.

wofostSimulation.title: WOFOST Simulation
wofostSimulation.subtitle: PCSE mechanistic model — daily LAI and biomass for this parcel.
wofostSimulation.intro: Runs WOFOST with weather, soil, and sowing date resolved from your parcel context.
wofostSimulation.selectParcel: Select a parcel to run WOFOST
wofostSimulation.deployPendingBody: The simulation API is being rolled out. Try again after the backend deploy completes.
wofostSimulation.phase2Note: Endpoint is live — full simulation UI ships in the next phase.

varietyFinder.title: Variety Finder
varietyFinder.selectParcelDesc: Choose a parcel to use its environment for variety recommendations
varietyFinder.noResults: No varieties found for this selection
varietyFinder.noDataAvailable: No data available for this species yet

climateExplorer.legendCsa: Csa (Mediterranean) — ideal for olives and vineyards due to dry, hot summers
climateExplorer.legendBSk: BSk (Semi-arid) — requires resilient crops or irrigation
climateExplorer.legendGeneral: The climate zones indicate the suitability for different agricultural practices.

empty.title: No data retrieved.
empty.hint: Select filters and search to retrieve real data from DAD-IS.

errors.loadBreeds: Failed to load breeds from DAD-IS.

settings.title: DAD-IS API Configuration
settings.description: The FAO DAD-IS API cannot be used for commercial purposes. Each user must provide their own API credentials obtained directly from FAO.

fallback.title: Available Data Sources (without DAD-IS)
fallback.description: The BioOrchestrator integrates multiple biodiversity data sources via IkerKeta that are available without DAD-IS credentials:

sources.gbif: Global livestock occurrence records via GBIF-mediated data
sources.agrovoc: FAO agricultural thesaurus — species, breeds, and practices
sources.eppo: European plant protection organisation — pest and disease data
sources.globaltreesearch: Botanic Gardens Conservation International — tree species
sources.pesticides: European Commission — authorised plant protection products
sources.cpvo: Community Plant Variety Office — registered crop varieties

phenology.notFound: No parameters found for this selection
phenology.usingDefaults: Using default parameters — no exact match for this selection

contribute.title: Contribute phenology parameter
contribute.description: Submit your research data for scientific review. Your contribution will be reviewed by an administrator before being merged into the main parameter set.
contribute.author: Author(s)
contribute.success: Parameter submitted for review. Thank you for your contribution.

phenology.usingDefaultsDetail: Using generic FAO-56 values for {{params}}. No cultivar-specific data for this species.

dataGaps.title: Agronomic data
dataGaps.yieldUnavailable: Yield estimation is unavailable until missing data is completed.

thermal.title: Thermal Tolerance
thermal.subtitle: Heat and frost stress damage limits for each crop. Data automatically derived from EcoCrop or published in scientific literature.
thermal.empty: No thermal thresholds available for this species. If EcoCrop has temperature data, thresholds can be derived automatically.
thermal.pendingDerivation: {{count}} EcoCrop species have temperature data but thresholds haven't been derived yet.

npk.title: Nutrient Absorption Profile (NPK)
npk.subtitle: Nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium absorption rates per phenological stage. Data from peer-reviewed scientific literature.
npk.totalRow: Total N: {{n}} kg/ha  Total P: {{p}} kg/ha  Total K: {{k}} kg/ha (full season)
npk.empty: No NPK absorption profile for this species.
npk.disclaimer: Absorption rates are indicative. Actual values depend on management, soil, climate, and planting density.

soil.title: Soil Requirements
soil.subtitle: Optimal soil conditions for each crop. Data from EcoCrop GAEZ v4 (FAO).
soil.empty: No soil requirements available for this species.
soil.allPresent: All catalog crops have EcoCrop soil requirements.

organic.title: Organic Inputs
organic.empty: No authorized organic inputs found for this crop.
organic.eppoUnavailable: EPPO API not configured — organic input lookup unavailable.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.selectPrompt: Select a parcel to view alerts
alerts.empty: No active alerts for this parcel

rotation.title: Rotation Constraints
rotation.subtitle: Minimum intervals between crops to prevent soil pathogens and depletion. Data from FAO guidelines and phytopathological literature.
rotation.empty: No rotation constraints registered for this crop. If no restrictions are known, free rotation is assumed.
rotation.lowCoverage: Only {{count}} rotation rules registered. Most crops lack data.

panel.noCrop: This parcel has no crop assigned. Assign one to see agronomic recommendations.
panel.cropNotInCatalog: The crop '{{crop}}' is not in the catalog. Agronomic data is not available.
panel.none: No agronomic data for this crop. Recommendations cannot be generated without it.
panel.partial: Missing {{n}} data types. Recommendations may be incomplete.
panel.scenarioIncomplete: Both crops have incomplete data. The comparison may be inconclusive.
panel.deprecatedSoilNote: Deprecated data — coming soon from Soil module
panel.title: Recommendations

vegetation.title: Vegetation Indices
vegetation.noEntity: The vegetation-health module has not processed this parcel yet.
vegetation.noDataInPeriod: No images available in the selected period. Try a wider range.
vegetation.lowCount: Only {{count}} images available. Trend may not be representative — possible cloud cover.

soilPanel.title: Soil Data
soilPanel.noEntity: The soil module has not processed this parcel. Soil data requires defining horizons and selecting data providers.

assign.title: Assign variety to parcel
assign.organicWarningBody: Only {{organicTrials}} organic trials vs {{conventionalTrials}} conventional for this crop/climate. Yield and risk calculations have lower precision. Estimated yield: -{{pct}}% (Seufert et al. 2012, Ponisio et al. 2015).
assign.noParcels: No parcels available. Create a parcel first.
assign.noParcelSelected: No parcel selected — please select one in the platform

planning.noSuggestions: No trial data for this parcel profile
planning.trustOrganicWarning: Conventional trial data — estimated organic yield
planning.npkDisclaimer: Estimate based on soil and crop demand — does not replace field analysis

yieldProjection.title: Yield Projection
yieldProjection.subtitle: Yield estimates from trial data (Phase A) and stress-corrected in-campaign projections (Phase B).
yieldProjection.selectParcel: Select a parcel to view yield projections
yieldProjection.noResults: No varieties found for this crop and climate combination.
yieldProjection.pickCropDesc: Choose a crop and Köppen climate zone to see top-performing varieties from trial sites in similar environments.
yieldProjection.inCampaignDesc: Load the FAO-33 stress-corrected yield projection for the current crop.
yieldProjection.noProjectionDesc: Load a yield projection to see in-campaign estimates.

speciesExplorer.subtitle: Browse 45+ species with full phenology, thermal tolerance, soil requirements and NPK profiles.
speciesExplorer.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, EPPO code, or scientific name...
speciesExplorer.selectSpecies: Select a species from the list to see its agronomic profile.
speciesExplorer.noPhenology: No phenology data for this species.
speciesExplorer.noThermal: No thermal tolerance data for this species.
speciesExplorer.noSoil: No soil suitability data for this species.
speciesExplorer.noNutrients: No NPK data for this species.

parcelHealth.title: Parcel Health
parcelHealth.selectPrompt: Select a parcel to view its health status
parcelHealth.noCrop: No crop assigned to this parcel yet.
parcelHealth.goToVarietyFinder: Go to Variety Finder to assign a crop variety first.
parcelHealth.noSensorData: No sensor data yet. Deploy sensors or wait for satellite pass.

waterBudget.title: Water Budget
waterBudget.selectPrompt: Select a parcel to calculate irrigation needs

comparator.title: Crop Comparator
comparator.defaultPricesNote: Prices set to default (1). Economic margins equal agronomic yield. Enter real prices for economic comparison.
comparator.scoreNote: Score = weighted rank (yield 40% + margin 30% + carbon 20% + soil 10%)

disclaimer.text: Recommendations are based on agronomic models and third-party scientific data. They do not replace professional judgment. Consult your local agricultural technician before making crop decisions.

onboarding.varietyFinder: Find the best crop varieties for your climate and soil. We analyze trial data from environments similar to yours and rank varieties by yield performance.
onboarding.climateExplorer: Each point is a trial site colored by its Köppen-Geiger climate zone. Click a point to see its details. Use this to find sites with climates similar to your farm.
onboarding.phenologyBrowser: Crop coefficients (Kc, D1, D2, MDS) describe how a crop uses water at each growth stage. These values come from published scientific research.
onboarding.rotationConstraints: Some crops cannot be planted after others due to shared pests, diseases, or soil depletion. These rules come from FAO guidelines and scientific literature.
onboarding.soilSuitability: Each crop has specific soil requirements: pH range, texture preference, drainage needs, and salinity tolerance. Match your soil to find suitable crops.
onboarding.thermalTolerance: Heat and frost thresholds indicate when crop damage begins. Derived values are estimated from species temperature ranges; Published values come from field research.
onboarding.npk: Nitrogen (N), Phosphorus (P), and Potassium (K) uptake varies by growth stage. Use these profiles to plan fertilizer applications.
